ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees working at the store */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* Date the store was closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., supermarket, convenience store) */,
  "store_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of customers the store can accommodate at a time */,
  "store_area" REAL /* Total area of the store in square meters */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager (foreign key to employees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, sales associate) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in (e.g., sales, HR, finance) */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the employee's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the employee's shift */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor (foreign key to employees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store's location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "nearest_major_city" TEXT /* Nearest major city to the location */,
  "distance_to_major_city" REAL /* Distance to the nearest major city in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., sales, customer satisfaction) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_period" TEXT /* Period of the metric (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_locations" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
